'''Espan Balfed''' was a [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of the noble [[Balfed family]].

==Biography==
Before the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Balfed family was one of the great families in galactic society. They lost their influence and prestige and were disgraced when the rival [[House of Tagge/Legends|House of Tagge]] framed them.

Lord Espan Balfed was the youngest descendant of the House of Balfed, but was considered a noble in title only. He had no money, political influence or significant fame and was the [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of a small [[Imperial Customs Frigate|customs frigate]].

Despite his reduced status the nobleman always informed a ship's crew of his lineage before inspecting a vessel. Whether the trader showed the proper respect greatly influenced the level and intensity of the inspection.
